The blend is supplied in an encapsulated solid format to support controlled storage, handling, and measurement within laboratory environments. The encapsulated format serves solely as a physical containment and presentation method and does not imply any route of administration. BPC-157 / TB-500 (Tβ4) Blend is intended exclusively for controlled in-vitro laboratory research conducted by qualified professionals exploring peptide stability, compatibility, and interaction models. Research Applications: In-vitro evaluation of multi-peptide compatibility and stability Laboratory studies examining interactions between distinct peptide classes Comparative analysis of single-peptide versus blended research systems Analytical and mechanistic research involving synthetic regulatory peptides Storage and Handling: Store in a cool, dry environment away from direct light Maintain container tightly sealed when not in use Handle using appropriate laboratory safety and aseptic techniques Product Specifications: Analytical Approach to Finished Formulations: Purity is a metric used for isolated raw materials, such as lyophilized peptide powders. Finished formulations—such as capsules, liquids, and topicals—contain multiple components, including excipients and stabilizers. In these systems, a single purity value does not accurately represent the overall composition. Instead, identity and assay (content) are reported on the COA to confirm the presence of the correct compound and to verify that the labeled amount per unit is accurate. This approach reflects standard analytical practice and provides more meaningful information for research applications. Format: Encapsulated solid multi-peptide research blend Appearance: White to off-white solid Solubility: Soluble in aqueous laboratory media following capsule removal for analytical use Compliance Notice: BPC-157 / TB-500 (Tβ4) Blend is FOR RESEARCH USE ONLY.
